name: ActionIQ
description: ActionIQ — Enterprise customer data platform for real-time audience segmentation and marketing orchestration.

seo.title: ActionIQ — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: ActionIQ: ActionIQ — Enterprise customer data platform for real-time audience segmentation and marketing orchestration.

when_to_use: Real-time audience segmentation for email retargeting
Marketing orchestration across paid + owned channels
Suppression lists to avoid over-messaging churned users
Lookalike audience export to Meta and Google Ads
Enterprise CDP replacing siloed CRM + DMP stack

pros: Strong real-time audience segmentation at scale
Composable CDP approach leverages your warehouse
Good governance and privacy controls for enterprise
cons: Requires mature data team to operate effectively
Less focused on product analytics; more marketing
review.verdict: Enterprise-grade CDP for marketing teams with warehouse-first data; overkill for product-led startups.
review.best_for: Large enterprise marketing teams with mature data stacks needing real-time audience activation.
review.not_for: Startups, product analytics use cases, or teams without a centralized data warehouse.

lock_in.reason: CDP identity graph and audiences tightly bound to platform

developer_experience.reason: APIs and connectors for data teams; marketing-first UX
